description: Legal document (iqrār). In Arabic script, in beautiful handwriting. Dated: Ramaḍān 568 AH, which is 1173 CE. A few lines earlier, Rabīʿ I of the same year is mentioned. The case seems to involve three men (including Abū l-Faḍā'il and Abū ʿAbdallāh) and a woman. (Information in part from Baker/Polliack catalog.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי (אקראר). בכתב ערבי, בכתב יד יפה. תאריך: רמדאן 568 להג'רה, 1173 לספירה. התיק נראה כולל שלושה גברים ואישה.
